---
title: "main"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(quantreg)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(car)
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("insurance.csv")
```

```{r}
data
```

## Pagrindiniai kintamieji

### Gydymo kaina

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=charges))+
        geom_histogram()
```

```{r}
length(boxplot(data$charges, plot=FALSE)$out)
```


### Amžius

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=age))+
        geom_boxplot()
```

```{r}
length(boxplot(data$age, plot=FALSE)$out)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=age, y=charges))+
        geom_point()
```

### Lytis

```{r}
table(data$sex)
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(data$sex))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=sex, fill=sex))+
        geom_bar() +
        scale_fill_manual(values = c("pink", "lightblue"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = sex, y = charges, fill = sex)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("pink", "lightblue"))
```

### KMI

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = bmi)) +
  geom_histogram()
```

```{r}
length(boxplot(data$bmi, plot=FALSE)$out)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=bmi, y=charges))+
        geom_point()
```

### Vaikų skaičius

```{r}
table(factor(data$children))
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(factor(data$children)))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = factor(children))) +
  geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=factor(children), y=charges))+
        geom_violin() +
        geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```

### Rūkymo statusas

```{r}
table(data$smoker)
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(data$smoker))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=smoker)) +
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=smoker, y=charges)) +
        geom_violin() +
        geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```

### Regionas

```{r}
table(data$region)
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(data$region))
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=region)) +
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=region, y=charges)) +
        geom_violin() +
        geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```

### Koreliacijų matrica

```{r}
cor_matrix <- cor(data[, c("age", "bmi", "children", "charges")], method="spearman")

corrplot(cor_matrix, method="square", type = "lower")
```


## Multikolinearumo tikrinimas

```{r}
vif(lm(charges ~ ., data = data))
```

## Mokymo/testavimo aibė

```{r}
train_index <- sample(1:nrow(data), size = 0.8 * nrow(data))
train_data <- data[train_index, ]
test_data <- data[-train_index, ]
```

## Modelio tobulinimas

```{r}
model1 <- rq(charges ~ ., data=data, tau = 0.75)
```

```{r}
summary(model1)
```

```{r}
model2 <- rq(charges ~ . + age*bmi, data=data, tau = 0.75)
```

```{r}
summary(model2)
```

```{r}
model3 <- rq(charges ~ . + age*bmi + smoker*bmi, data=data, tau = 0.75)
```

```{r}
summary(model3)
```

```{r}
model0 <- rq(charges ~ ., tau = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.05), data = data)

plot(summary(model0), par='age')
```

```{r}
plot(summary(model0), par='bmi')
```

```{r}
plot(summary(model0), par='children')
```

## Modelio tinkamumas

```{r}
model3 <- rq(charges ~ . + age*bmi + smoker*bmi, data=train_data, tau = 0.75)
pred <- predict(model3, newdata = test_data)
actual <- test_data$charges
```

```{r}
mae <- mean(abs(actual - pred))
mae
```

```{r}
rmse <- sqrt(mean((actual - pred)^2))
rmse
```

```{r}
# Quantile loss
tau <- 0.75
loss <- mean(ifelse(actual >= pred,
                    tau * (actual - pred),
                    (1 - tau) * (pred - actual)))
loss
```



```{r}
fit0 <- rq(charges~1,tau=0.75,data=train_data)

rho <- function(u,tau=.5)u*(tau - (u < 0))

R1 <- 1 - model1$rho/fit0$rho
R2 <- 1 - model3$rho/fit0$rho

R1
R2
```
